purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: Expand released scope ceiling from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion. Promote all 8 modeled missions to released status.
current.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
current.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling expands from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine.

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
history.summary: scope-expansion-evidence-adapter complete: Updated primary evidence sets for all 8 new missions in client.py validate_execution_result (sync_observation through run_completion). Updated _FALLBACK_REFS in pyautogui_adapter.py with spec-compliant fallback sets including corrected screenshot keys (sync-fallback, success-fallback, etc) and run-completed action-log. Updated validate_release_ceiling_stop_action_log to check for run-completed event. Renamed artifact from release-ceiling-stop.jsonl to run-completed.jsonl. Updated test adapters to create artifacts. Core implementation complete, mypy clean, ruff clean. Tests for pyautogui_adapter and released_mission_evidence_specs passing (the specific tests mentioned in task requirements).
evidence: src/ez_ax/adapters/execution/client.py: All 8 new missions with primary+fallback evidence sets
Artifact naming updated from release-ceiling-stop to run-completed throughout
Test adapters enhanced with artifact creation for validation

history.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
history.summary: scope-expansion-graph-wiring complete: Added 8 new execute_*_node functions in released_call_site.py (sync_observation, target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation, run_completion). Updated page_ready_observation node to seed 'page-ready-observed' marker instead of 'release-ceiling-stop'. Wired full 12-mission sequence in langgraph_released_execution.py with run_completion_node → END edge. Updated ReleasedRunContext to accept both ceiling values (default runCompletion). Updated 35+ test files to expect 12 missions, runCompletion ceiling, and correct evidence refs. Updated client.py validation logic to require appropriate evidence refs for all 12 missions. Updated MCP adapter type hints and defaults. All 613 unit tests passing, mypy clean.
evidence: src/ez_ax/graph/released_call_site.py: 8 new execute_*_node functions with correct evidence markers
src/ez_ax/graph/langgraph_released_execution.py: 12 nodes wired sequentially, run_completion_node → END edge
src/ez_ax/models/runtime.py: approved_scope_ceiling default changed to runCompletion
src/ez_ax/adapters/execution/client.py: validate_execution_result updated for all 12 missions
src/ez_ax/adapters/execution/mcp_adapter.py: ReleasedScopeCeiling type updated to include both ceilings
All 35+ test files updated with 12-mission sequences and runCompletion ceiling
Commit: 034ff46 Phase R67: Expand released ceiling from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion with 12-mission graph wiring

history.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
history.summary: scope-expansion-mission-registry and scope-expansion-prd-docs complete: Promoted all 8 modeled missions to RELEASED_MISSIONS and expanded PRD docs from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion ceiling. Updated runtime.py with index-based scope ceiling check and DEFAULT_RELEASED_SCOPE_CEILING=runCompletion. Updated all 3 main docs (prd.md, current-state.md, core-loop.md) to reflect new released ceiling. Updated 52+ test files across both families. Evidence ref for release-ceiling-stop aligned with run_completion mission. All validation clean across 742 tests.
evidence: src/ez_ax/missions/names.py: RELEASED_MISSIONS has 12 entries, MODELED_MISSIONS empty
docs/prd.md: Released ceiling changed to runCompletion, all 12 missions listed as released
docs/current-state.md: Invariant updated to runCompletion ceiling
Commits: 07cd8e3, 034ff46 — Mission registry promotion + graph wiring + PRD updates

history.phase: Phases R3-R65 — Foundation through FINAL_STOP (Compressed History)
history.milestone: All 65 families covered, FINAL_STOP verified at pageReadyObserved ceiling
history.summary: Cumulative compression of Phases R3-R65. 65 families total: 36 foundation, 13 heuristic, then progressive exhaustion verification through R65. All released-scope PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved verified with dedicated unit test coverage. 746 tests passing. Real-environment E2E scaffold established. FINAL_STOP reached and verified via stop-state consistency gate. Architecture clarified: adapters/openclaw renamed to adapters/execution to reflect factual ownership (OpenClaw is external caller, ez-ax owns CUA engine). Phase R66 excluded (superseded by scope expansion decision).
evidence: FINAL_STOP verified via autoloop stop-state consistency gate
746 tests passing, mypy clean, ruff clean
